title: 初始化 pnpm monorepo 骨架 + shared 包
description: 创建 pnpm workspace 配置、根 package.json、TypeScript 配置、packages/shared 包骨架。
action: 初始化 pnpm monorepo：创建 pnpm-workspace.yaml（packages: apps/*, packages/*）、根 package.json（name: agenthub, private: true, packageManager: pnpm@9.15.0, scripts: dev:web/dev:desktop/build/test/lint/type-check）、根 tsconfig.json（strict: true, target: ES2022, module: ESNext, moduleResolution: bundler）。创建 packages/shared/（package.json name: @agenthub/shared, tsconfig.json extends root, tsup.config.ts entry: src/index.ts, src/index.ts 空导出）。
implementation: 创建根 package.json: name agenthub, private true, packageManager pnpm@9.15.0, scripts: { dev:web: pnpm --filter @agenthub/web dev, dev:desktop: pnpm --filter @agenthub/desktop dev, build: pnpm -r build, test: pnpm -r test, lint: pnpm -r lint, type-check: pnpm -r type-check }

创建根 tsconfig.json: compilerOptions { strict: true, target: ES2022, module: ESNext, moduleResolution: bundler, esModuleInterop: true, skipLibCheck: true, forceConsistentCasingInFileNames: true, declaration: true, declarationMap: true, sourceMap: true }

创建 packages/shared/package.json: name @agenthub/shared, version 0.0.1, type module, main dist/index.js, types dist/index.d.ts, exports { '.': { import: './dist/index.js', types: './dist/index.d.ts' } }, scripts: { build: tsup, type-check: tsc --noEmit }
创建 packages/shared/tsconfig.json: extends ../../tsconfig.json, include src
创建 packages/shared/tsup.config.ts: entry ['src/index.ts'], format ['esm'], dts true, clean true
创建 packages/shared/src/index.ts: 空导出文件
